'''bazhuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waalah|waalah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waalah|waalah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bazhuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhizhith|bæzhizhith]] || [[word:bæzhizhij|bæzhizhij]] || [[word:bæzhizhish|bæzhizhish]] || [[word:bæzhizhi|bæzhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhuzhuzhuth|bazhuzhuzhuth]] || [[word:bazhuzhuzhuj|bazhuzhuzhuj]] || [[word:bazhuzhuzhush|bazhuzhuzhush]] || [[word:bazhuzhuzhu|bazhuzhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhuzhuth|bazhuzhuth]] || [[word:bazhuzhuj|bazhuzhuj]] || [[word:bazhuzhush|bazhuzhush]] || [[word:bazhuzhu|bazhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhufzhuth|bazhufzhuth]] || [[word:bazhufzhuj|bazhufzhuj]] || [[word:bazhufzhush|bazhufzhush]] || [[word:bazhufzhuf|bazhufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhuzhuthu|bazhuzhuthu]] || [[word:bazhuzhuju|bazhuzhuju]] || [[word:bazhuzhushu|bazhuzhushu]] || [[word:bazhuzhuku|bazhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhuzhuth|bazhuzhuth]] || [[word:bazhuzhuj|bazhuzhuj]] || [[word:bazhuzhush|bazhuzhush]] || [[word:bazhuzhu|bazhuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhuzhuthul|bazhuzhuthul]] || [[word:bazhuzhujul|bazhuzhujul]] || [[word:bazhuzhushul|bazhuzhushul]] || [[word:bazhuzhukul|bazhuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhuzhuthuthu|bazhuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:bazhuzhujuju|bazhuzhujuju]] || [[word:bazhuzhushushu|bazhuzhushushu]] || [[word:bazhuzhuku|bazhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhuzhuthun|bazhuzhuthun]] || [[word:bazhuzhujun|bazhuzhujun]] || [[word:bazhuzhushun|bazhuzhushun]] || [[word:bazhuzhukun|bazhuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhuzhuthuoro|bazhuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:bazhuzhujuoro|bazhuzhujuoro]] || [[word:bazhuzhushuoro|bazhuzhushuoro]] || [[word:bazhuzhukuoro|bazhuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
